name: Churu Pops Cat Treat – Chicken Recipe
shortDescription: Churu Pops Chicken Recipe soft, hydrating jelly cat treats with 91% moisture. Grain-free, low-calorie, and enriched with Vitamin E for a healthy, tasty snack your cat will love.
description: Treat your cat to a fun, hydrating snack with Churu Pops Chicken Recipe . These soft, jelly-style treats are crafted with 91% moisture , helping your cat stay healthy and hydrated while enjoying a savory, creamy flavor. Perfect for cats of all ages, from kittens to seniors, these low-calorie treats are a delicious way to add variety to your cat’s day. Each tube delivers 6.5 calories per serving and is made with wholesome ingredients, including real chicken, natural flavors, and a touch of scallop for an irresistible taste. With Vitamin E for immune support and green tea extract as a natural antioxidant, Churu Pops are a treat you can feel good about giving. These jelly treats can be fed directly from the tube by hand, making snack time interactive and fun. Free from grains, preservatives, and artificial colors, Churu Pops are a healthy choice that cats will love. Key Features Hydrating jelly treats with 91% moisture Soft, squeezable texture for feeding by hand Grain-free, preservative-free, and no artificial colors Low-calorie – only 6.5 kcal per tube Enriched with Vitamin E and green tea extract for immune support and antioxidants Suitable for all life stages Feeding Instructions Feed as a treat only. Not intended as a complete meal. Always provide clean, fresh water and consult your veterinarian regularly. Storage Instructions Refrigerate after opening and serve as soon as possible. Ingredients Water, Chicken, Natural Flavors, Natural Scallop Flavor, Agar-agar, Guar Gum, Xanthan Gum, Vitamin E Supplement, Green Tea Extract Guaranteed Analysis Crude Protein (min): 7.00% Crude Fat (min): 0.20% Crude Fiber (max): 0.30% Moisture (max): 91.00% Vitamin E (min): 310 IU/kg Calorie Content 430 kcal/kg | 6.5 kcal per tube (ME) Net Weight 2.16 oz (0.54 oz × 4 tubes)
